title: How Facebook's Algorithmic Tweaks Affected Engagement with News URLs over Time
snippet: Media coverage of Prof. Fabio Giglietto's presentation at the 2026 International Communication Association (ICA) annual conference in Cape Town, analyzing the long-term impact of partisanship, news quality, and Facebook's shifting algorithmic governance on content reach.
description: Media live-blog coverage of Fabio Giglietto's research presentation at the ICA 2026 conference regarding Facebook's algorithmic impacts on news URL engagement.

title: Indagine urbinate: "Così l’algoritmo influenza il voto" - Il Resto del Carlino

title: Algoritmi e democrazia, il caso Meta secondo lo studio di UniUrb
snippet: An article detailing the media and political impact of Prof. Fabio Giglietto's study 'A Pretty Blunt Approach,' noting how it was featured on Rai3's investigative program 'Report' and went on to spark an official European Parliament inquiry into Meta's algorithmic transparency and content practices.
description: An article highlighting the significant media and political impact of Prof. Fabio Giglietto's study on Meta's algorithmic transparency, which led to a European Parliament inquiry.

title: Facebook premia gli estremisti: la ricerca dell'Università di Urbino - Lumsanews
Meno contenuti politici nei feed, la stretta di Meta è stata meno efficace contro gli estremisti - Il Sole 24 ORE
description: News article from Il Sole 24 ORE

title: Secondo uno studio dell'università di Urbino l'algoritmo di Facebook ora punisce la politica ufficiale e premia gli estremisti antieuropei. Pd e FdI verso una legge bipartisan sulle piattaforme
snippet: A detailed journalistic report on Fabio Giglietto's investigation into Facebook's ranking systems. It reports Giglietto's findings that Meta's policies severely restricted the reach of institutional politicians by up to 73.4% compared to 2021, while extremist, anti-European, and conspiracy-driven accounts saw their overall visibility grow.
description: A news article detailing a study by Fabio Giglietto from the University of Urbino on how Facebook's algorithm impacts the visibility of mainstream versus extremist political accounts.

title: Secondo uno studio dell'università di Urbino l'algoritmo di Facebook ora punisce la politica ufficiale e premia gli estremisti antieuropei. Pd e FdI verso una legge bipartisan sulle piattaforme - Open
Researchers meet to discuss DSA access to publicly available platform data
snippet: An official news update from the European Commission's Joint Research Centre detailing a high-level meeting. Fabio Giglietto was featured as a selected European expert collaborating with ECAT and DG Connect to leverage the Digital Services Act (DSA) to study platform systemic risks and public data access.
description: An official news update from the European Commission's Joint Research Centre featuring Fabio Giglietto as a selected European expert collaborating on Digital Services Act (DSA) platform data access.

title: Katharina Esau Was Awarded an ARC Discovery Early Career Researcher Award 2026 - Oncodaily
